description_long: This object is a standard skateboard featuring a flat, elongated deck with slightly upturned ends, known as the nose and tail. The top surface is covered in a solid black grip tape, providing traction for the rider's feet. The deck appears to be constructed from layered wood, visible as a thin orange-brown edge running along the sides. Underneath, two metal trucks are mounted, each holding a pair of small, hard wheels, typical for street or park skateboarding. The wheels are a light gray color and are attached to the trucks with visible axles. The overall design is minimalistic, with no visible graphics or branding on the deck or wheels.
description: A classic skateboard with a black grip-taped deck, orange-brown wooden edges, and gray wheels mounted on metal trucks. The design is simple and functional, with no visible graphics or logos.
description_view_0: End-on view showing the rounded nose or tail, black grip tape, and a hint of the orange-brown deck edge.
description_view_1: Side profile displaying the full length of the black deck, orange-brown edge, and both sets of gray wheels and trucks.
description_view_2: Opposite end-on view, similar to view 0, highlighting the rounded end and deck thickness.
description_view_3: Side profile from the opposite side, mirroring view 1 with the same features visible.
attribute_wheel_type: street, small, gray, no visible markings or branding
attribute_truck_style: standard, silver metal, top-mounted, no visible branding or unique features
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: solid black, no visible pattern or graphics
